sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 45:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 45:1
items.html: It is as the measure of ZAT of the Sefira of straightness that separates between one circle and the other. ZAT of Keter of straightness separate between the ten Sefirot of the circle of Keter and the circle of Hochma; ZAT of the Sefira Hochma of straightness separate between the ten Sefirot of the circle of Hochma and the circle of Bina, and so on (see answer 89). (Part Two, Chapter One, Inner Light, Item 90)
